# components/documents

Reusable document management UI components for file upload, listing, and CRUD operations. Exports client-side components for drag-and-drop file selection, document card display with inline purpose toggling, confirmation modals for destructive actions, and skeleton loading states.

## Contents

### Upload & Input
- [upload-zone.tsx](./upload-zone.tsx) — `UploadZone` drag-and-drop component validating PDF/XLSX/Markdown/TXT uploads via MIME types and extensions, triggering `onUpload(files: File[])` callback
- [delete-dialog.tsx](./delete-dialog.tsx) — `DeleteDialog` confirmation modal with "Keep Document" / "Delete Document" buttons, warning of permanent index removal
- [replace-dialog.tsx](./replace-dialog.tsx) — `ReplaceDialog` confirmation modal for document replacement, interpolating document title into warning text

### Display Components
- [document-card.tsx](./document-card.tsx) — `DocumentCard` rendering file icon, title, size, upload date, status badge (Queued/Indexing/Ready/Failed), purpose toggle button ("Pitch" ↔ "RAG"), and action menu (Replace File/Delete)
- [document-list.tsx](./document-list.tsx) — `DocumentList` container mapping `Document[]` to `DocumentCard` instances, showing skeleton loader or empty state prompt

## Props Contracts

All components use controlled patterns via callbacks:
- `UploadZone`: `onUpload: (files: File[]) => void`
- `DocumentCard`: `onDelete: (id: string) => void`, `onReplace: (id: string, file: File) => void`, `onPurposeChange: (id: string, purpose: "pitch" | "rag") => void`
- `DocumentList`: passes through all `DocumentCard` callbacks
- Dialogs: `open: boolean`, `onOpenChange: (open: boolean) => void`, `onConfirm: () => void`, `loading?: boolean`

## File Type Validation

```typescript
ACCEPTED_TYPES = '.pdf,.xlsx,.md,.txt'
ACCEPTED_MIME_TYPES = [
  'application/pdf',
  'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet',
  'text/markdown',
  'text/plain'
]
```
Drop handler validates via MIME type array, with fallback extension checks for `.md` and `.txt` in browsers without MIME support.

## Status Badge Mapping

| Document Status | Badge Label | Variant | Additional UI |
|----------------|-------------|---------|---------------|
| `pending` | "Queued" | `secondary` | — |
| `processing` | "Indexing..." | `default` | Pulsing `Progress(50)` |
| `ready` | "Ready" | `default` | Chunk count `"(N chunks)"` |
| `error` | "Failed" | `destructive` | — |

## Date Formatting Rules

`formatDate(dateString)` in `document-card.tsx`:
- `<1 minute` → `"Just now"`
- `<60 minutes` → `"{min}m ago"`
- `<24 hours` → `"{hr}h ago"`
- `<7 days` → `"{days}d ago"`
- `≥7 days` → `"MMM DD"` format

## Dependencies

Consumes shadcn/ui primitives from `@/components/ui`: `Card`, `Badge`, `Dialog`, `DropdownMenu`, `Button`, `Progress`, `Skeleton`. Imports `Document` type and `formatFileSize` utility from `@/lib/api`. Uses `FileText`, `FileSpreadsheet`, `MoreHorizontal` icons from `lucide-react`.

## File Relationships

`DocumentList` delegates per-item rendering to `DocumentCard`, which composes `FileIcon` and `StatusBadge` internal components. Dialogs are standalone confirmation overlays invoked by parent containers (typically `apps/web/app/documents/page.tsx`). `UploadZone` manages file input state and validation, passing sanitized `File[]` arrays to parent handlers.
